programme.title: Prison 77
programme.desc: Manuel is sentenced to 20 years for stealing a mear 1200 Euros, prompting him to start a movement. 2022. Spain. Director: Alberto Rodriguez. Starring: Miguel Herran, Javier Gutierrez.

programme.title: Suzhou River
programme.desc: Following a prison sentence for attempting to kidnap a woman, Marda meets another young woman with a striking resemblance. 2000. China. Director: ?Lou Ye. Starring: Zhou Xun, Jia Hongsgeng.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A young Jewish boy forcibly kidnapped by order of the cardinal. 2023. Italy, France. Director: Marco Bellocchio. Starring: Paolo Pierobon, Fausto Russo Alesi.

programme.title: An American Pastoral
programme.desc: A vitriolic debate is sparked in a rural Pennsylvanian community over the future of their public schools. 2024. France. Director: Auberi Edler.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.

programme.title: Oh, Canada
programme.desc: An ailing filmmaker has his story told, but as life is separated from myth, hard truths rise to the surface. 2024. Canada, USA. Director: Paul Schrader. Starring: Richard Gere, Uma Thurman.

programme.title: Winter Boy
programme.desc: In his last year of boarding-school, the death of Lucas' father turns his life upside-down. 2022. France. Director: Christophe Honore. Starring: Paul Kircher, Vincent Lacoste, Juliette Binoche.

programme.title: Toy Love
programme.desc: Sleezy Ben has just exited a not-so faithful relationship, when he falls for an unpredictable vixen, Chlo. 2002. New Zealand. Director: Harry Sinclair. Starring: Dean O'Gorman, Kate Elliott.

programme.title: Plenty
programme.desc: Post WWII Susan meets her now husband, Brock. She soon comes to realise she was happiest during the war. 1985. UK. Director: Fred Schepisi. Starring: Meryl Streep, Sam Neill, Charles Dance.

programme.title: Another World
programme.desc: A business executive struggles to maintain work-life balance. 2021. France. Director: Stéphane Brizé. Starring: Vincent Lindon, Sandrine Kiberlain, Anthony Bajon.

programme.title: Suzhou River
programme.desc: Following a prison sentence for attempting to kidnap a woman, Marda meets another young woman with a striking resemblance. 2000. China. Director: ?Lou Ye. Starring: Zhou Xun, Jia Hongsgeng.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A young Jewish boy forcibly kidnapped by order of the cardinal. 2023. Italy, France. Director: Marco Bellocchio. Starring: Paolo Pierobon, Fausto Russo Alesi.

programme.title: An American Pastoral
programme.desc: A vitriolic debate is sparked in a rural Pennsylvanian community over the future of their public schools. 2024. France. Director: Auberi Edler.

programme.title: Oh, Canada
programme.desc: An ailing filmmaker has his story told, but as life is separated from myth, hard truths rise to the surface. 2024. Canada, USA. Director: Paul Schrader. Starring: Richard Gere, Uma Thurman.

programme.title: Divertimento
programme.desc: Sisters Zahia and Fettouma dream of making classical music accessible to all. 2022. France. Directors: Marie-Castille, Mention-Schaar. Starring: Oulaya Amamra, Lina El Arabi, Niels Arestrup.

programme.title: Abebe: Butterfly Song
programme.desc: Australian musician David Bridie fell in love with Papua New Guinea after hearing 'Abebe' (Butterfly Song) aboard a bus. 2023. Australia, Papua New Guinea. Director: Rosie Jones.

programme.title: Bolero
programme.desc: In 1928 Paris, a composer struggles to find inspiration, revisiting his life to create the masterpiece. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Anne Fontaine. Starring: Raphael Personnaz, Doria Tiller.

programme.title: The Outrun
programme.desc: Fresh out of Rehab, Rona returns home to the wild and beautiful islands of Orkney to start afresh. 2024. UK, Germany. Director: Nora Fingscheidt. Starring: Saoirse Ronan, Paapa Essiedu.

programme.title: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Rose and her older brother's close relationship is tested when he is accused of sexual assault. 2025. Germany, Spain. Director: Sarah Miro Fischer. Starring: Giamo Alfredi, Laura Balzer.

programme.title: Saint Omer
programme.desc: Rama attends a trial to get material for her new book, but her narrative is derailed as the trial continues. 2022. France. Director: Alice Diop. Starring: Kayije Kagame, Guslagie Malanda.

programme.title: Death Without Mercy
programme.desc: Following the tragic 7.8 magnitude earthquake in Syria, two Syrian families are left to pick up the pieces. 2024. UK, USA. Director: Waad Al-Kateab.

programme.title: Caravaggio's Shadow
programme.desc: Caravaggio's verdict rests on the Pope's decision to grant him clemency for killing a rival. 2022. Italy, France. Director: Michele Placido. Starring: Riccardo Scamarcio, Louis Garrel.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: A headmaster, obsessed with timeliness, misses his train to an important speech turning his day on it's head. 1986. UK. Director: Christopher Morahan. Starring: John Cleese, Penny Leatherbarrow.

programme.title: Abebe: Butterfly Song
programme.desc: Australian musician David Bridie fell in love with Papua New Guinea after hearing 'Abebe' (Butterfly Song) aboard a bus. 2023. Australia, Papua New Guinea. Director: Rosie Jones.

programme.title: Bolero
